event_name: Breaking the Chains: Community Awareness Workshop
description: A one-day workshop focusing on stigma reduction, early intervention, and family support for substance use disorders.

event_name: Mindful Recovery: 8-Week Mindfulness-Based Relapse Prevention
description: An eight-week group program combining mindfulness practices with cognitive-behavioral strategies to prevent relapse.

event_name: Family Healing Circle: Supporting Loved Ones
description: A workshop designed for families and caregivers to learn about addiction, communication skills, and self-care.

event_name: Youth Resilience Program: Prevention Through Education
description: A two-day interactive workshop for school leavers and university students focusing on substance use prevention and life skills.

event_name: Healing Through Art: Expressive Therapy Workshop
description: Art therapy session for individuals in recovery to explore emotions and build coping mechanisms in a safe environment.

event_name: Recovery in the Hills: Weekend Retreat
description: A three-day residential retreat combining peer support, meditation, and nature-based healing activities.
target_audience: Individuals in recovery, peer support workers

event_name: Addiction and the Brain: Professional Training
description: One-day CPD-accredited training for counselors and healthcare workers on neurobiology of addiction and evidence-based interventions.

event_name: Women in Recovery: Empowerment Circle
description: A supportive workshop addressing gender-specific challenges in addiction recovery, with guest speakers and peer sharing.

event_name: Community Outreach & Screening Camp
venue: Hambantota District General Hospital – Outpatient Area
description: Free addiction screening, brief interventions, and referral services for rural communities. Includes awareness materials in Sinhala and Tamil.
organizer: National Dangerous Drugs Control Board (NDDCB) – Hambantota

event_name: Peer Support Facilitator Training
description: Three-day training for individuals with lived experience to become certified peer support facilitators.

event_name: Awareness Walk & Community Dialogue
description: A public walk followed by a panel discussion on rebuilding lives after addiction in post-conflict communities.

event_name: Holistic Healing: Yoga & Nutrition Workshop
description: Workshop integrating yoga, nutrition, and lifestyle changes to support physical and mental well-being in recovery.

event_name: Substance Use and Mental Health Dual Diagnosis Seminar
description: Educational seminar for healthcare workers on co-occurring disorders, assessment, and integrated treatment approaches.

event_name: Safe Spaces: LGBTQ+ Affirming Recovery Group
description: A confidential, affirming support group for LGBTQ+ individuals navigating addiction recovery.

event_name: Prevention in Schools: Teacher Training Workshop
description: Training for teachers to identify early signs of substance use and deliver evidence-based prevention programs in schools.

event_name: 12-Step Facilitation: Introductory Workshop
description: Introduction to 12-step facilitation principles and how to integrate them into clinical and community settings.

event_name: Healing the Healer: Burnout Prevention for Addiction Professionals
description: A day focused on self-care, compassion fatigue, and resilience for professionals working in addiction services.

event_name: Community-Based Rehabilitation: Stakeholder Meeting
description: Multi-stakeholder dialogue to strengthen community-based rehabilitation programs for substance use disorders.
target_audience: Local government, NGOs, police, health officials

event_name: Mind-Body Connection: Meditation and Recovery
description: A one-day silent meditation retreat tailored for individuals in recovery, focusing on mindfulness and inner peace.

event_name: Empowering Youth: Life Skills Camp
description: Three-day camp for adolescents focusing on decision-making, peer pressure, and healthy alternatives to substance use.

event_name: Recovery Through Employment: Vocational Training Fair
description: A fair connecting individuals in recovery with vocational training opportunities and potential employers.

event_name: Healing from Trauma: Trauma-Informed Care Workshop
description: Training for addiction service providers on trauma-informed approaches and the link between trauma and substance use.

event_name: Art of Parenting in the Digital Age
description: Workshop for parents on recognizing risks of online substance glorification and fostering protective family environments.

event_name: Reintegration Support: Employer Roundtable
description: A roundtable discussion to promote employment opportunities for individuals in recovery and reduce workplace stigma.

event_name: Building Resilient Communities: Multi-District Conference
description: Year-end conference bringing together stakeholders from all districts to share best practices and plan for 2028.
organizer: National Alliance for Recovery – Kegalle Chapter
